emails.subject: Credit Derivatives
emails.body: Credit Derivatives Rod: attached is a recap of current credit derivatives trading in Jeff K.'s group. I don't know about activity during Shari's oversight but I hear it was minimal. How does this compare with Enron Credit.com? Also, do we want agreements with other trading counterparties (e.g., DLJ Capital Funding, Inc.)? Are Jeff and Paul calling credit before trading? Please call to chat when you have a chance. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: Credit Derivatives
emails.body: Rod: Further to my recent memo, the Tokheim debt is being transferred to DLJ (and we owe Deutsche Bank for the unwind of the loan swap). Sara P.S. Who will handle credit derivatives in your absence? Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 05/30/2000 09:00 AM Sara Shackleton 05/18/2000 09:46 AM

emails.subject: Re: Credit Derivatives
emails.body: Re: Credit Derivatives Better yet, who is handling them in my presence? Thanks for the position summary. From: Sara Shackleton on 05/30/2000 09:02 AM
